title: Nereo Website
subtitle: High-performance brand presence maximizing conversion through fluid UI physics.
about:
What is Nereo?

A digital storefront and brand identity requiring absolute frontend perfection. It represents a pivot from static templates to bespoke, heavily animated web experiences.

challenge.title: The Challenge: Bland legacy web presence
challenge.description: The previous iteration lacked brand identity, suffered from poor load times, and failed to capture user attention resulting in high bounce rates.

cards.title: High Bounce Rate
cards.description: Users were leaving the site within seconds due to unengaging layouts.

cards.title: Janky Animations
cards.description: Legacy CSS animations were causing heavy layout shifts and performance drops.

solution.title: Our Solution: Bespoke physics-driven interface
solution.description: A ground-up rewrite prioritizing GPU-accelerated compositing and incredibly precise design-system tokenization.

features.title: Scroll-Triggered Physics
features.description: Elements inherently react to user scroll velocity and viewport intersection.

features.title: Atomic Design System
features.description: Tailwind utilized to ensure ultra-low CSS payload and rapid iteration.

techStack.title: Our Tech-Stack: The Modern Web
techStack.description: Focused completely on frontend edge-delivery mechanisms.

categories.name: Animation Layer
categories.description: Framer Motion executing complex spring physics directly in the DOM.

categories.name: UI Framework
categories.description: React 19 ensuring concurrent rendering doesn't drop layout frames.

results.title: Lightning Fast Loads
results.description: Sub-second LCP (Largest Contentful Paint) metrics globally.

results.title: Increased Conversion
results.description: Massively improved time-on-site thanks to engaging interactive elements.
